_doc: Dokkai naturalness-exception kanji: non-N5 kanji whose KANA-only
form would damage reading-passage authenticity. Authentic JLPT N5
passages routinely include these in compound words.
- data/papers/dokkai/*.json passages MAY use these kanji.
- bunpou / moji / goi paper content MUST stay strictly N5
- data/reading.json (older Reading-practice tab) STAYS strict N5
(lighter passages; learners get authentic exposure via dokkai).
- To add a new kanji here, document the passage that needs it

2026-05-03 (moji-and-source audit §2.2): added 向, 央, 付 with justifications — 向 for 〜向け target-audience compounds, 央 for 中央 proper nouns (parks/stations), 付 for 〜付き menu convention. All three appear in dokkai passage content multiple times; kana-substitution would reduce passage authenticity.
